programme.title: Forbidden Science - Deepest Desires
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: As the SoCal Bluefin Tuna fishing season begins to take shape, Ali and Rush head out to fish the waters of San Diego and see what new surprises may be in store for them this year. For many boats in the fleet, the heading turns to the south for a visit to the commercial tuna pen operation that often attracts other fish from miles away. It's parking lot fishing at its best, but with a change in technique and break from the crowd Ali puts Rush on the bite!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: When it comes to fishing and the marine industry, we are often more united by the Bluefin tuna than we think. For Ali Hussainy, the Bluefin is responsible for fueling his life long passion as an angler, and in this episode he gets to share that passion with two friends that have their own ties to the species. For wildlife biologist Forrest Galante and master sushi chef Hiroyuki Terada, catching a bluefin tuna on rod and reel will be a first!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Local Knowledge crew heads to Catalina Island off the coast of Southern California to participate in the 2024 War Heroes On Water tournament. This event offers a unique opportunity for the sport fishing community to create meaningful connections with our nation's heroes while raising awareness of the challenges they sometimes face when transitioning back to civilian life. With a little bit of luck and a lot of teamwork, Ali and Rush hope to put their veterans on a Bluefin tuna bite they won't forget!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Rush takes up an invite from good friend and fellow guide Jared Cyr to sight fish for barracuda and bonefish in the shallow waters of the Florida Keys. Meanwhile Rush's boat takes a break from charter fishing to get a new Seakeeper RIDE system installed.

programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: From the ocean to the lab, The Big Reveal dives deeper into the hidden impact of electromagnetic pollution. Discover how Aires Tech is helping people, animals, and even bees thrive—unlocking the secrets to balance, vitality, and true wellness in our connected age.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. At Scout & Zoe’s, Cindy unveils a bold new commercial that captures her brand’s quirky spirit while driving sales in a competitive pet market. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The Big Reveal does it again by bringing three very different entrepreneurs together, all connected by their pioneer spirit. Flag Guard tips off this episode by explaining how they’re doing their part in keeping your loved ones safe. programme.title: Death Valley & Mono Lake
programme.desc: Experience the dramatic beauty of Death Valley, from sunrise over the sand dunes to the colorful formations of Zabriske point. Explore the unique limestone formations known as "tufa towers", the amazing bird life, and relaxing serenity of Mono Lake, an inland sea at the base of the Sierra Mountains. Bonus footage of the geothermal "hot creek" in the Sierras. This film is newly extended with awe-inspiring footage of the nesting Ospreys and aerial views of Mono Lake!

programme.title: Alaska
programme.desc: Journey into the beautiful wilderness of Alaska through the photography of Olof & Elizabeth Carmel. This art display film showcases their most stunning photographs of America's last great wilderness - from breaching whales and misty mountains of the Inside Passage to the Grizzlies and soaring peaks of Denali National Park. This 60 minute film will give you new appreciation for the wilderness of the wild North. Accompanied by a beautiful acoustic guitar soundtrack.

programme.title: The Squaw Man (1931)
programme.desc: An English aristocrat accused of a crime he did not commit flees to the American West, where he starts a new life and falls in love with a Native American woman. As he builds a future on the frontier, his past returns to threaten the family he has created, forcing him to face difficult choices between honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Rough Riding Ranger (1935
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger goes undercover to track down a gang of outlaws responsible for a string of robberies, working to expose their leader and restore law and order to the region

programme.title: Law of the Lash
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal sets out to capture a notorious outlaw gang, confronting corruption and danger as he fights to bring justice to the frontier

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Old Overland Trail 1953
programme.desc: A cavalry officer is sent to investigate a series of stagecoach robberies along the Overland Trail, uncovering a dangerous plot that threatens vital frontier communications

programme.title: Utah 1945
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Utah, a lively mix of song, romance, and Western action! When a city socialite inherits a sprawling ranch, she plans to sell it off—until Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers step in to show her the true value of life on the range. With scheming villains, sweeping landscapes, and plenty of toe-tapping tunes, this Roy Rogers classic proves that the West is as rich in heart as it is in land.

programme.title: Code Of The Cactus
programme.desc: When Blackton outbids Bill Carson. Bill suspects he will have to rustle cattle to fulfill the contract. So Bill arrives posing as an Mexican. When he rustles the cattle from the rustlers, it gets him into the gang. Hoping to bring them all to justice, he is in trouble when his true identity is revealed.

programme.title: Any Gun Can Play
programme.desc: A gang robs a gold shipment from a train. A so called bounty hunter is sent to track down the robbers and decides to let them lead him to the gold.

programme.title: Arizona Days (1937) Colorized : Tex Ritter
programme.desc: In Arizona Days, singing cowboy Tex Ritter rides tall in a tale of music, justice, and frontier grit. When a gang of rustlers threatens to bleed the territory dry, Tex takes a job as tax collector and uses his wits, fists, and six-guns to bring law and order. Filled with trail songs, fast-paced action, and Ritter’s easygoing charm, this Western delivers classic entertainment from the saddle.

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon
programme.desc: Maynard hears the cry of the weird masked "phantom" of Tombstone Canyon. The plot thickens when Maynard discovers a man with a key to his past has been murdered by the phantom.
